programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of an Irish girl, Murdoch uncovers a plot to kill a visiting British prince and must face a fanatical group of terrorists known as the Brotherhood.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch investigates the death of a landowner found hanging from a tree and discovers tracks nearby in the shape of no human feet; when crop circles are also discovered, he must consider if the killers were aliens.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: When "Buffalo Bill Cody's Western Extravaganza" pulls into town, murder is close behind.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: Team Scorpion continues work with their nemesis to prevent humanity's extinction; Cabe's last-minute decision while on the case endangers his career.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: When poachers almost kill a pregnant deer, the team tries to save the deer and the fawn; Happy and Toby discuss the future of their family.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: While decommissioning an old nuclear missile, an accident causes the team to endure exposure to toxic vapor while trying to prevent the nuke from detonating; Paige confronts Happy about constantly tagging along with her and Walter.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: While attending a tech convention, Team Scorpion is taken hostage by a group attempting a virtual heist.

programme.title: Twilight
programme.desc: When Bella Swan moves to a small town, she falls in love with Edward Cullen, a 108-year-old vampire.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: New Moon
programme.desc: Edward leaves Bella, and she falls into another difficult relationship - this time with Jacob Black.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Eclipse
programme.desc: Bella is forced to choose between her love for vampire Edward and her friendship with werewolf Jacob.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 1
programme.desc: The Quileutes close in on Edward and Bella, whose unborn child poses a threat to the Wolf Pack and Forks.

programme.title: American Yakuza
programme.desc: Viggo Mortensen ("Green Book") stars as an undercover FBI agent who has risen through the ranks of the Yakuza and now finds himself caught in a war between the Yakuza, the mob and the FBI.

programme.title: Elephant White
programme.desc: An assassin is hired by a businessman to avenge the murder of his daughter by white slave traders in Thailand.

programme.title: Blitz
programme.desc: Jason Statham stars as a tough cop who's dispatched to take down a serial killer who has been targeting police officers. Also featuring Paddy Considine and Aidan Gillen.

programme.title: Edison
programme.desc: Ambitious young reporter Pollack (Justin Timberlake) suspects insidious corruption in his town's elite police unit, known as F.R.A.T., and finds a friendly source in Deed (LL Cool J), a dissatisfied member of the squad. With Deed's information and the backing of his publisher, Ashford (Morgan Freeman), and a crusading lawyer, Wallace (Kevin Spacey), Pollack infiltrates the secretive police cabal. He finds himself in over his head, however, when he discovers the true extent of the criminality.

programme.title: Transsiberian
programme.desc: On their way home from China, married Christian missionaries Roy (Woody Harrelson) and Jessie (Emily Mortimer) take a train from Beijing to Moscow. On board, they befriend Carlos (Eduardo Noriega) and Abby (Kate Mara). When Roy does not return in time at one stop, Jessie waits for him to catch up at the next station. Carlos and Abby stay with her, insisting the town is unsafe, however Carlos' attempts to "befriend" Jessie radically change the dynamic of the trip.

programme.title: FernGully: The Last Rainforest
programme.desc: The magical inhabitants of a rainforest fight to save their home, which is threatened by logging

programme.title: The Beastmaster
programme.desc: A sword-and-sorcery fantasy about a young man's search for revenge. Armed with supernatural powers, the handsome hero and his animal allies wage war against marauding forces

programme.title: The Nut Job
programme.desc: An incorrigibly self-serving exiled squirrel finds himself helping his former park brethren survive by raiding a nut store, a location that also happens to be a front for a human gang's bank robbery.

programme.title: Hit and Run
programme.desc: A former getaway driver jeopardizes his Witness Protection Plan.

programme.title: Sahara
programme.desc: After the fall of Tobruk in June 1942, U.S. Army sergeant Joe Gunn leads his tank into the Sahara desert.

programme.title: Ike: Countdown To D-Day
programme.desc: A study of the days leading up to the Normandy invasion through the eyes of Eisenhower and Winston Churchill.

programme.title: Glory
programme.desc: The saga of the first black fighting unit in America s civil war is an inspiring testament to courage, the human spirit, and the value of freedom. Edited for Television

programme.title: The Whole Nine Yards
programme.desc: Nick is a struggling dentist in Canada. A new neighbor moves in, and he discovers that it is Jimmy "The Tulip" Teduski. His wife convinces him to go to Chicago and inform the mob boss who wants Jimmy dead.

programme.title: Mickey One
programme.desc: A mediocre stand-up comic with gambling debts runs away to the West Side of Chicago, and under an assumed name, takes a job as a janitor. Yearning to go back on the stage and win applause at all costs, he contacts his agent, who books him a gig to perform.

programme.title: Pal Joey
programme.desc: An egotistical nightclub singer must choose between the wealthy socialite who can help his career and the chorus girl who's stolen his heart.

programme.title: The Doctor Takes A Wife
programme.desc: A publicity stunt links a fiercely independent writer in matrimony with a chauvinistic medical school professor.

programme.title: Bell, Book And Candle
programme.desc: A modern-day witch likes her neighbor but despises his fiancee, so she enchants him to love her instead... only to fall in love with him for real.

programme.title: Filly Brown
programme.desc: FILLY BROWN is an inspiring and gritty portrait of a young artist striving to find her voice and seize her dreams without compromise. Majo Tonorio, aka, "Filly Brown" is a young, raw hip-hop artist who spits rhymes from the heart. With a mother in prison and a father struggling to provide for his daughters, Majo knows that a record contract could be her family's ticket out. But when a record producer offers her a shot at stardom, she is suddenly faced with the prospect of losing who she is as an artist, as well as the friends who helped her reach the cusp of success. Fueled by a fierce hip-hop score, FILLY BROWN is propelled by an exceptional cast featuring Gina Rodriguez, Lou Diamond Phillips, Edward James Olmos and the legendary Jenni Rivera in her final on-screen performance.

programme.title: Homegrown
programme.desc: Life is good for Jack, Carter and Harlan, three inept ne'r-do-wells who help run master dope-grower Malcoms flourishing marijuana plantation somewhere in northern California. But then Malcom is suddenly bumped off by a mysterious assailant, after a moment of panic, the naive trio decide to take over the business themselves. However, their lazy days on the dope farm have ill prepared them for the high-stakes game of finding buyers for millions of dollars of contraband. As they plunge into a shadowy new world of duplicity, double-dealing and danger, they soon find that they have gotten in way, way over their heads. But driven on by increasing greed and paranoia, it's too late to back out.

programme.title: My Sassy Girl
programme.desc: A sweet Midwestern guy with his life planned out for himself is wooed, groomed, and ultimately dumped by a complicated, elusive gal.

programme.title: Once Upon A Time In China II
programme.desc: Arriving by train in Guangzhou, 1895, the trio fight off White Lotus followers, who want to kill all foreigners and the cute, European dressed 13th Aunt. It's not kung fu master Dr. Wong's (Jet Li) last fight.

programme.title: Pound of Flesh
programme.desc: A man's heroic attempt to help a woman in distress ends up with him waking up the next day without a kidney.

programme.title: Erased
programme.desc: Ex-CIA operative Ben Logan has been long estranged from his young daughter.

programme.title: King of Killers
programme.desc: A group of highly experienced assassins in Tokyo attempt to take out the world’s deadliest killer.

programme.title: The Tournament
programme.desc: A 24 hour "kill or die" tournament is held in an English town. The winner will claim a $10,000,000 cash prize.

programme.title: From Paris with Love
programme.desc: In Paris, an employee for the US Ambassador hooks up with an American spy looking to stop a terrorist attack.

programme.title: Joe Baby
programme.desc: A money collector for a private investigator is hired to track down 10 million dollars stolen in a dodgy real estate deal, opening a complex can of worms.

programme.title: 12 To Midnight
programme.desc: A detective gets kicked off the force when the murder of his wife drives him to drink. When a new string of murders seem connected to her death, he soon finds himself squaring off against a killer who appears to be superhuman.

programme.title: Prey of Wrath
programme.desc: An elite special forces operative is sent by Russian Intelligence to hunt down former teammates who have hijacked nuclear warheads.

programme.title: The Wide West
programme.desc: 1907. A mysterious gambler aids a couple of Japanese sumo wrestlers, the local Judge and a beautiful store owner against ruthless outlaws who have attacked a small Californian town.

programme.title: Andromeda: 1883
programme.desc: Space marine Casey Reynolds travels into the past to stop a killer android bent on wiping out the one person crucial to saving the human race.

programme.title: God of War
programme.desc: A maverick commander and a young general join forces to battle pirates who pillage small villages in 16th-century China. The violent clash of wits and weapons will ultimately decide who rules the land.

programme.title: God of War 2
programme.desc: Benevolent healer Seon-ui discovers a divine medicinal substance called 19. She names it Il-yeo-po and they become friends until Dong Zhuo's soldiers forcibly seize Il-yeo-po.

programme.title: The Villainess
programme.desc: Honed from childhood to be an elite assassin, Sook-hee embarks on a rampage of violence and revenge to finally earn her freedom and escape her past.

programme.title: Shadow
programme.desc: To finally achieve victory over a rival kingdom, a brilliant general devises an intricate plan involving his wife, a look-alike and two kings.

programme.title: Taken in Broad Daylight
programme.desc: The true story of 17 year old Anne Sluti.

programme.title: The Grim Sleeper
programme.desc: Starring Dreama Walker, Macy Gray, Ernie Hudson, and Michael O'Neill.

programme.title: Cellmate Secrets
programme.desc: Casey Anthony's former jail mate reveals how the two forged a deep friendship.

programme.title: Dancing With a Murderer
programme.desc: Nora, haunted by a gala-night murder, must face her darkest fears.

programme.title: Taken in Broad Daylight
programme.desc: The true story of 17 year old Anne Sluti.

programme.title: The Grim Sleeper
programme.desc: Starring Dreama Walker, Macy Gray, Ernie Hudson, and Michael O'Neill.

programme.title: Best Friend From Heaven
programme.desc: When her dog is killed, Tara cancels her wedding. But her dog's ghost and her small town have a surprise.

programme.title: Campus Caller
programme.desc: When a university student goes missing, her mother a former cop goes in search for her.

programme.title: Love Marks the Spot
programme.desc: Ghostwriter Becca unexpectedly ends up on the trail from a legendary novel with action star Lee.

programme.title: Fatal Performance
programme.desc: A struggling actress is hired to impersonate a woman for a business meeting, but soon finds her life in danger.

programme.title: My Mother's Future Husband
programme.desc: A mother and daughter work through the pain of the past so they can open their hearts to the future.

programme.title: Moonlight
programme.desc: In three defining chapters, Chiron, a young Black man growing up in Miami, is guided to manhood by the kindness, support, and love of his community.

programme.title: Falcon Rising
programme.desc: Former Marine John "Falcon" Chapman is a dark anti-hero driven by guilt and suffering from PTSD, who will destroy himself unless given something else to destroy - a useful weapon-of-last-resort for the U.S. State Department.

programme.title: The Challenger
programme.desc: The Challenger follows the life struggles of a young, Bronx auto mechanic, Jaden Miller. When Jaden and his mother are evicted from their home, he soon finds that boxing may be the key to stop them from living on the streets and the ticket to a better life. With legendary trainer, Duane Taylor, Miller becomes a local hero and captures the attention of a cable network that decides to create a reality show around his goal to fight to the Light-Heavyweight Title.

programme.title: On Angel's Wings
programme.desc: When an angel grants a struggling water girl (Taylor Faye Ruffin) three wishes, even her mom (Robin Givens) or coach (Reginald VelJohnson) can't figure out how she became a soccer superstar.

programme.title: I'll Be There
programme.desc: More than a decade after distancing herself from her complicated family, Grace's carefully built life is upended when her brother AJ is diagnosed with cancer. As her estranged siblings reunite in Los Angeles, Grace is forced to confront old wounds, buried loyalties, and the role she once played in her fractured family-set against the surreal backdrop of Michael Jackson's death.

programme.title: The Drive
programme.desc: A doctor is driving home from a conference when he learns his daughter has been kidnapped, and the betrayal comes from those closest to him. With each mile, the certainty that someone within his trusted circle is responsible turns the journey into a spiral of shock and resolve, as the threat to his daughter’s life grows more personal and more urgent.

programme.title: How Did We Get Here
programme.desc: Four struggling couples attend a wellness retreat led by Dr. Sellers. Melonie and Derrick struggle with issues of infidelity, Omar and Sonya struggle with commitment, Chastity and Monae have differing opinions on parenthood, and Stephanie and Delvin are struggling with their intimacy. As the couples dive into their treatment, they must confront their own demons to move forward. Will they make it out together? Or go their separate ways?

programme.title: His Masterpiece
programme.desc: Victoria and Richard are divorced spouses that operate an art gallery together. After meeting young artist Daniel at a community event, they decide to collaborate with him on the exhibit to generate income for their tax obligations. However, Richard's aggressive nature and ulterior motives soon come to light, leading to a dangerous jealousy within him.

programme.title: Widower Syndrome
programme.desc: Following a near-fatal car accident a year ago, Xavier and his wife Amanda, take their daughter on a road trip hoping for a family reset. After a pit stop, Amanda and Alexandria disappear, and everyone is convinced he came to the park alone. A race of desperation to find the truth, may also reveal Xavier’s own sanity.

programme.title: The Wrong Someone
programme.desc: Tina and Phillip’s marriage is struggling and teetering on the edge of no return. When her former flame, Mike, comes back into her life. All the while, Phillip begins engaging into a flirtatious affair with her best friend Makella. Will Tina honor her marriage? Or move on to someone new.

programme.title: 3 Headed Shark Attack
programme.desc: The world's greatest killing machine is three times as deadly when a mutated shark threatens a cruise ship.

programme.title: Mega Piranha
programme.desc: A mutant strain of giant ferocious piranha escape from the Amazon and eat their way toward Florida.

programme.title: Tomb Invader
programme.desc: Determined to find out why her mother disappeared, an adventurer enters the dangerous Tomb of Quin Shi Huang.

programme.title: Independents' Day
programme.desc: Aliens invade Earth, tell humans to emigrate to a new planet or die. The President and a militia fight back.

programme.title: 2025 Armageddon
programme.desc: Aliens attack Earth using the gigantic creatures and disasters found on a B-movie TV Channel.

programme.title: The Editor (Edited Version)
programme.desc: Rey Ciso was once the greatest editor the world had ever seen. Since a horrific accident left him with four wooden fingers on his right hand, he's had to resort to cutting pulp films and trash pictures. When the lead actors from the film he's been editing turn up murdered at the studio, Rey is fingered as the number one suspect. The bodies continue to pile up in this absurdist giallo-thriller as Rey struggles to prove his innocence and learn the sinister truth lurking behind the scenes.

programme.title: Creeping Death
programme.desc: Halloween was always Tims favorite holidayuntil his mother was diagnosed with brain cancer. Now, all he wants is a quiet night in. That is quickly disrupted when his friends pay him an unwanted visit, after stealing a mysterious sack from the doorstep of a local crazy. This sacrilegious act unleashes the Aos Si, a Celtic spirit that walks the Earth on Halloween. They must band together and survive the night or make the ultimate offeringtheir lives--this Halloween, all who trick are treats.

programme.title: Camp Cold Brook (Edited Version)
programme.desc: TV producer Jack Wilson (Chad Michael Murray) fears his paranormal reality show will be cancelled. Desperate to increase the ratings, Wilson takes his filming crew out to investigate the legendary Camp Cold Brook--an abandoned summer camp where a mass murder had taken place decades ago. They soon realize they are not alone

programme.title: Bloody Pit Of Horror
programme.desc: When the crew of a photoshoot breaks into a castle, they unleash the madness of the owner who is possessed by the spirit of a 16th century torturer.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Reno Crevice and Sam Forney, a pair of rival gamblers who hate each other with a passion, face off in a series of increasingly dangerous and gruesome games in order to see who will leave town when all is said and done.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Land owner woos snobby, and wealthy woman to help finance a development project. He wins her over with a potion from his ex, voodoo priestess, that contains a deadly warning - resulting in an undead Margaret amorously chasing him without end.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Richard and Della are invited to a cabin owned by their wealthy former best man, Alan. Richard slowly becomes convinced that Della is having an affair with Alan. After murdering the two of them, Richard realizes just how wrong he was.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Stacy and Devlin fall in love. Stacy's fiancée, Mitch sets out to kill Devlin. However, Mitch soon gets a nasty surprise when he discovers Devlin's has a supernatural necklace and proves his love to be strong in the face of death.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Insurance agent James kills his client in a plot to take his client's money and his wife. However James' boss shows up to reveal that he knows about the murder, and blackmails James to meet his demands.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Marty plans to run off with all of the money from charity concerts, but his conscience is trying to get through to him. His greedy banker blackmails him for half of the money, while his conscience is trying to get him to do the right thing.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Mary Jo, is forced into labor on the farm of George and Luisa Yates, in exchange for being sheltered from the police. One day, Mary Jo suffers a head injury and believes that a scarecrow is her lover, which the Yates plan to use for their benefit

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Aspiring ventriloquist Billy Goldman wants to improve his craft. To that end, he seeks out his idol, retired ventriloquist Mr. Ingels for advice. Soon after, Billy finds out that his idol has a dark past, as well as a gruesome secret.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A witch posing as a cosmetic salesperson visits the home of young, eccentric couple, Donald and Judy. She convinces Judy to try a magic necklace that allows the two of them to swap bodies, leaving Donald to try and figure out which one is his wife.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A greedy funeral director exploits grieving families by overcharging and reusing coffins. When his orphaned nephew comes to live with him, the boy discovers his uncle's cruelty-until a deadly twist ensures the undertaker gets a chilling, ironic fate.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A comic book artist for Tales From the Crypt finds his gruesome drawings coming to life after his wife meddles with his work. As bizarre murders mirror his art, he's caught between reality and fantasy in a twisted, darkly comedic horror tale.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A two-faced sideshow freak discovers his origins when a greedy carnival owner buys a mysterious Egyptian mummy. Their fates intertwine in a darkly comic twist, revealing a bizarre family connection and a macabre inheritance.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A woman witnesses a brutal murder from her window, but shock leaves her unable to speak. Her husband calls a doctor-who is secretly the killer. Trapped in silence, she must find a way to warn someone before it's too late.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A brash TV host films a live special inside a supposedly haunted house, mocking the supernatural. As eerie events escalate, his skepticism turns to terror when he realizes the spirits are real-and they've been waiting for him.

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Conjoined twins Eddie and Frank share everything-except personalities. When a doctor offers to separate them, greed, jealousy, and betrayal surface, leading to a darkly ironic twist where the wrong brother pays the ultimate price.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jethro's First Love" - Jethro decides that he wants to go a-courtin', so after Uncle Jed gives him a little education, he finds himself a woman--who happens to be a stripper. As usual, neither she or the Clampetts actually understand what the other is really saying.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampette Look" - Cynthia Fenwick makes her filthy rich mother dress in the "Clampett Look" when they visit the Clampetts, since she thinks Elly is a fashion maven. That only reinforces the Clampett's belief that the Fenwicks are poor.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly Starts to School" - Mrs. Drysdale recommends Elly for a high-brow finishing school in hopes that humiliating her will drive the Clampetts away; but instead Miss Hathaway convinces the girls at the school that Elly is a fashion trend-setter. Elly invites the filthy rich Fenwicks over, thinking they're destitute.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Hair-Raising Holiday" - After Granny cuts off the top of Drysdale and Clyburn's (his doctor) hair for some homegrown remedy, Clyburn tries to keep her from ever doctoring again. Meanwhile, the Clampetts are looking forward to the Possum Day parade, which of course isn't celebrated in Beverly Hills, so Drysdale has to figure out how to have one to keep them happy.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Gets the Misery" - Jed cheers up Granny by pretending to be sick so she can doctor him. Soon Drysdale and his doctor, Clyburn, are subject to her methods as well.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

All the while a new teller sucks-up to the men and flirts with the women.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

Drysdale brings him to the Clampetts' just as Grannie showed Pearl how to use a love potion, so everyone thinks Twombly's interest in Grannie is love.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Get Psychoanalyzed" - Jethro needs a health certificate to graduate from the fifth grade, so he goes to the only doctor the Clampetts know about - Mrs. Drysdale's psychiatrist. He gets nowhere with Jethro, so Pearl comes and she thinks he is testing her virtue when he tries to lay her on his couch.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts in Court" - When a couple who ran into the Clampett's car discover that they're rich, they fake injuries and sue the Clampetts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

But when Mr. Drysdale's boss comes and wants to meet them for dinner, he wonders if he's going to be sent to an Alaskan bank when his boss finds out he's been lying about Jed and his family being sophisticated.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Duke Becomes a Father" - Mlle. Denise comes back for the birth of her dog's puppies, and to see Jed. They do some "courtin' and sparkin'" Mrs. Drysdale isn't nearly so happy when she finds the puppies share more in common with Duke the bloodhound than Claude the poodle.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Hanged Man
programme.desc: After a condemned gunfighter (Steve Forrest) survives his own hanging, he helps a young widow stop a pitiless land baron from taking her ranch. This television feature boasts a strong cast of recognizable characters, including Will Geer, Sharon Acker, Dean Jagger, BarBara Luna, and Cameron Mitchell. Director Michael Caffey would go on to work on such hit shows as Barnaby Jones and MacGyver. Also, look for John Mitchum, younger brother of Robert, in a small role. This movie originally aired on ABC-TV and was considered the pilot for a possible series. Writer/producer Andrew Fenady was behind several opular TV shows such as Branded and The Rebel, as well as the 1970 John Wayne feature, Chisum.

programme.title: Tulsa

She plays Cherokee Lansing, a determined young woman out to protect her father's honor after he's killed by men from a competing oil company. With a cast that includes Robert Preston, Ed Begley, and Pedro Armendariz, this engaging picture from producer Walter Wanger (Cleopatra, I Want to Live!) was nominated for an Academy Award in the Special Effects category. Also, listen for veteran character actor Chill Wills as the narrator!

programme.desc: In this episode, we introduce Slade Priest, the Hunting Land Man. Slade is a realtor for Realtree United Country out of the Southern States office in Mccomb, MS. He's hosted outdoor hunting shows in the past such as Trained Assassins and Realtree's Hunt United. He's also been featured in Realtree's Monster Bucks several times. programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Carla Hall kicks off Bean Week with her Black Bean Empanadas, stuffing golden, flaky pastry shells with a richly seasoned black bean filling that proves legumes can be just as craveable as meat. The hosts celebrate the internet's enthusiastic response to Clinton's Bean Week proposal and dive into the week with maximum enthusiasm.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon makes his deeply satisfying Pasta e Fagioli during Bean Week, building a thick, soul-warming pasta and bean soup that he considers one of the greatest cold-weather dishes ever conceived. The hosts debate the pronunciation of Italian words in Italian-American households and celebrate the cultural heritage behind this Roman classic.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Bean Week reaches its triumphant finale as Clinton Kelly makes a Chickpea Pasta and Chocolate Chip Cookies while a special musical surprise celebrates Carla Hall's lifelong dream of being honored Broadway-style. The hosts reflect on Bean Week's unexpected viral success and welcome a composer to help mark the occasion.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon makes Super Bowl Smash Burgers inspired by Carla Hall's hilarious hotel window-smashing incident the night before, breaking down his technique for maximum crust, cheese lace, and game-day efficiency. The hosts debate double-bun etiquette, share tips on underrated herbs, and tackle fan questions about making the most of a large Parmesan wedge.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon kicks off Super Bowl week ó his unambiguously favorite week of the year ó by making Smash Burgers with crispy seared edges, while Carla Hall makes Ham and Cheese Croquettes with sweet chili Doritos for extra crunch. Guest Josh Capon brings his expert restaurant energy to the game day kitchen.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Super Bowl week continues as Carla Hall makes her show-stopping Baked Brie wrapped in flaky puff pastry with honey and nuts, which Clinton defends as the real MVP of any game day spread. The hosts debate the ideal balance between indulgent party food and something a little elegant, and share their best game day hosting strategies.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Valentine's Day week launches with Carla Hall making an Easy Chicken Curry that she considers the perfect romantic dinner: warming, aromatic, and impressive without being stressful. The hosts debate whether cooking for a date should feel effortless or theatrical and share their own most romantic food memories.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly makes his legendary Sexy Time Chicken for Valentine's Day, a dish he swears exudes confidence, intention, and genuine romance with every bite. Guest Devyn Simone joins to share relationship etiquette wisdom, and the hosts explore what makes food truly feel romantic beyond just the recipe itself.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Amanda Freitag joins Clinton Kelly, Carla Hall, and Michael Symon for the Valentine's Day week finale, making a romantic pasta dish that inspires Michael to quote an Italian chef who calls the vigorous mixing of pasta 'the sound of love.' The hosts celebrate food as the ultimate love language and toast to the week with warmth, humor, and fresh pasta.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly arrives furious after producer Nick bans his gorgeous Ted Baker sweater due to moirÈ camera interference, and the ensuing sweater feud becomes the running gag of the episode as Chewed Up enters an Anything Goes week with no cooking theme and maximum creative freedom. Michael and Carla enjoy Clinton's frustration immensely.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly pitches his inspired Loaf Three Ways concept for Anything Goes week, proposing that each host make a different loaf ó savory, sweet, and somewhere in between ó in a format he has been developing for months. The hosts celebrate the Indiana Jones Temple of Doom opening number as the perfect anthem for a week with no rules.

programme.title: Winning Mealtime
programme.desc: Winning Mealtime: Sweet & Sour Pork Ribs (aka "Kid McGear Bones") - Chris makes a go-to favorite for his kids—sticky, sweet and sour pork ribs in bite-sized portions.

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying
programme.desc: "Butter Board" - Wow, even Chris couldn’t resist the call of the #butterboard. Here he makes an anchovy-onion-olive version inspired by something he saw on TikTok and his favorite French-Italian flatbread, pissaladière

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying
programme.desc: "Marry-Me Chicken" - Chris whips up the infamous “Marry-Me Chicken,” one of the most searched for recipes of 2022 due to its alleged ability to coax a marriage proposal from a reluctant lover.

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying
programme.desc: "Redemption Rice" - After an ill-advised dalliance with a terrible chicken korma recipe, Chris tries to redeem the category of mixed-rice dishes, starting with the classic Japanese Takikomi Gohan.

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying
programme.desc: "Crispy Gnocchi with Burst Tomatoes" - Chris prepares one of the all-time most popular dishes from New York Times Cooking: Crispy Gnocchi with Burst Tomatoes. Tune in to see if the dish lives up to its poetic name.

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying
programme.desc: "Fluff Bread" - According to TikTok, egg whites + sugar + cornstarch + chocolate chips = cloud (a.k.a.) fluff bread. In this episode, Chris checks the math on this equation.

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying
programme.desc: "Salt-Broiled Fish" - After a visit to the studio from Liwei Liao (@dry_aged_fish_guy), Chris finds himself with a beautiful sea bream that’s begging to be prepared simply. Salt-roasting, it is.

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying

programme.desc: He's a meat eater. She's a vegetarian. Their kitchen has become a battleground. Can this marriage be saved? It's Ellie to the rescue with flexible recipes that will bring them together. Recipes include Warm Spinach Salad with grilled sirloin, Panzanella with White Beans with chicken sausage, Forbidden Rice Bowl, and Grilled veggies & lamb kabobs served with Tahini Sauce.

programme.title: Cooking with Nick Stellino
programme.desc: Chef Stellino shares his sauce making secrets, to inspire the viewers with this elegant and sophisticated Mango and Ginger sauce that is easy to make and tastes delicious! He also shares some important fact about the uniqueness of the Black cod and his step by step secrets on how to plate this dish with the refined elegance of a professional chef.

programme.title: Cooking with Nick Stellino
programme.desc: Meatloaf when done right can be a work of art, something worthy of the finest restaurant. It is all about technique and it is never hard to do right. Chef Stellino re-interprets for his viewers a fabulous Sicilian recipe from his youth and in the process he shares with them a series of foolproof techniques for getting done right every time.

programme.title: Cooking with Nick Stellino
programme.desc: Cooking the perfect pork chop and preparing the ultimate sauce with port and Gorgonzola is a easy as 1-2-3! Making the perfect ricotta cheesecake is even easier. Chef Stellino loves to share his tips and techniques with a passionate delivery and easy to follow instructions.

programme.title: Cooking with Nick Stellino
programme.desc: Some call this the ultimate dinner, a perfectly cooked NY steak with a Vodka martini sauce! Chef Stellino once again shares all of his secrets in the making a an iconic sauce , the perfect accompaniment to the king of steaks: The New York. Then to sum it all up he shares with us a lusciously sweet, easy to make dessert of pears braised with Marsala!

programme.title: Cooking with Nick Stellino
programme.desc: A soup can be a form of art! Chef Stellino shares his secrets for the perfect soups, smooth , luscious and elegant. Plus he shows the viewers a series of simple techniques to create elegant topping to dress it all up. Simple clear instructions with step by step demonstrations on how to get it done in one try!

programme.title: Cooking with Nick Stellino
programme.desc: A great dish does not have to be difficult to make in order to taste great! Fresh ingredients and simple techniques are at the core of these fabulously, delicious recipes. Chef Stellino guides the viewers along each step with humor and passion. He also shares his plating techniques that will help the viewers enhance the look of their finished dishes.

programme.title: Cooking with Nick Stellino
programme.desc: Easy does it!, a delicious way to prepare a simple dish packed with flavor and panache, with easy to follow step by step instructions and plating directions. An old school recipe made simple for today's busy home chefs.

programme.title: Cooking with Nick Stellino
programme.desc: Nick prepares some of his favourite recipes including pasta with shrimp and zucchini, veal saltimbocca and cherry almond rice pudding.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Raichen’s Rules: Seafood: Seventy percent of the earth is covered with water and yet, the combination of live fire and seafood can be a grillers worst nightmare. For this season’s Raichlen’s Rules, we’ve decided to ease your anxiety. A lot of people are intimidated by the prospect of grilling seafood, but by strategically picking the method, fire can make the bounty of the sea wondrous.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Game Day Grill: No one knows what spectators ate at the first Olympic games, held in ancient Greece in 776 BCE, but today’s sports fans and grill fanatics like to celebrate their obsession with a barbecue. Tailgating favorites come hot off the grill in this episode as we tackle Project Fire Rib Wings, Buffalo Brisket Burnt Ends, and a Balkan Mixed Grill with some special guests.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Sandwiches Hit the Grill: It’s a simple formula: bread + protein + condiment, but it adds up to a triple decker of pleasure. In today’s show, the sandwich hits the grill. From a glorious BLT made with home cured and smoked bacon, to pan bagnat—a magisterial grilled tuna sandwich inspired by the French Cote d’Azur. And then it’s a sandwich for dessert in a Project Fire mystery box.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: The Mediterranean Grill: Physicians have long extolled the virtues of the Mediterranean diet. Today the healthy foods and vibrant flavors of the Mediterranean hit the grill when Steven grills Sicilian grilled artichokes and branzino stuffed with fennel stalks. Then there’s Greek grilled baby lamb chops with ember roasted potatoes prepared by friend and host of My Greek Table, Diane Kochilas.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Extreme Grilling: Steven has always enjoyed showing extreme grilling techniques that, though unconventional, deliver unabashedly delectable results, such as his Caveman T-bones or salmon on a shovel. Taking your grilling to the next level, that tradition continues with Lomo al Trapo with Fiery Colombian Salsa, Grilled Brussels Sprout Stalks with Curry Butter, and a Project Fire Mystery box.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Barbecue Takes Flight: What’s America’s most popular meat? It’s Poultry. Americans consume more than 112 pounds per person each year. Today Steven prepares an astonishing array of grilled poultry from brandy brined rotisserie chicken to duck legs flame roasted Peking-style. And with a special guest a Project Fire first: turkey “ribs”—found in St. Louis, and virtually nowhere else.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Skewering and spit-roasting meat rank among the world’s oldest and most universal grilling methods. Forty thousand years ago, Neanderthals roasted hunks of meat over a campfire. Today, Steven spit roasts a pork loin stuffed with onions followed by an Indian rotisserie leg of lamb perfumed with saffron. He then skewers the unknown ingredient inside the Mystery Box.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Often the most effective enhancements for a home’s interior are the easiest to accomplish. With a few pieces of molding and a little elbow grease we’re making some great improvements for some happy homeowners.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Buying a house is always a chore; but when it’s your first time, it’s both a challenge and an adventure. And when the house is a fixer-upper, that adventure becomes a way of life. Find out about buying a house in the first of our six-part series.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: In the second of our six-part series, the paperwork is done, but the fun has just begun as our First Time Homeowner tackles much needed renovations before she can move into her new home. Whether it’s repairs or improvements, there’s a lot to learn!

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: In the third of our six-part series, we increase the curb appeal on the outside of our First Time Homeowner house by adding a new front porch and replacing the deck, as well as installing new windows, doors, roofing, locks, and siding.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: In the fourth of our six-part First Time Homeowner series, we’re tackling the bathroom. Find out how we made the most of this small space with some big improvements, including a new vanity, countertop, faucets, flooring, and more!

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: In the fifth of our six-part First Time Homeowner series, we’re tackling the kitchen. Find out how we made the most of this small space by removing a wall, replacing the cabinets and countertops, tiling the floor, and more!

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: In the final installment of our six-part First Time Homeowner series, we tackle the yard and deck. Find out how we landscaped the yard to add curb appeal to the house, put in a crushed limestone driveway, and added a deck.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Danny Lipford and Allen Lyle visited the International Builders’ Show in Orlando, Florida, sponsored by the National Association of Home Builders. Check out the cool new tools, products, and building materials they found for your home!

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Everyone could use more storage space, so we’ve come up with some easy, practical storage solutions for your home, including a closet makeover, adding energy efficient attic storage, and building an addition to your storage shed.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: We’re taking a look at three very different bathroom renovations, from budget to modest to elaborate, that showcase the range of options available and demonstrate what’s involved in tackling a bathroom remodel in your home.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Summer is a great time for relaxing outdoors, but the heat and humidity can be hard on your house and yard. We’ve got some great tips to help both homeowners and their houses keep cool and survive the long, hot summer months.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: If your yard could use a little TLC, we’ve got you covered. From how to have a healthy lawn and plant a garden to refinishing wood furniture and installing a composite deck, we’ve got some great tips on how to improve your yard.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A renegade Apache named Chaqua raids the McCain Ranch and kidnaps Mark. Lucas gathers a group of men to get Mark back, but Chaqua plans to make him an Apache warrior since he lost his own son. Lucas will stop at nothing to get his son back to safety.

programme.title: The Rifleman
